sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Close #10785
This PR enables deterministic inference for models using TP > 1.

Modifications
Set NCCL_ALGO="allreduce:tree" and disable custom all-reduce when TP > 1.

sglang.title: Use jsonschema to constrain required or specific tool choice
sglang.author: TJ5
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
EBNF constraints for tool choice are hard to read and extend. They must be individually created for each model's tool call format. Instead, we can use a much more easily extended json schema constraint. Json schema enables a much more simple constraint for required or named tool choices t

sglang.title: [router][tool parser] Modify tool parser to return both normal text and tool calls (non-stream)
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Tool parsers should reserve any content before and after tool calls. Especially, when tool call parsing fails, the original text should be preserved as normal text.
The current behavior only returns a tool-calls list. When it is empty due to parsing failures, the user won't get any conten

sglang.title: [router] basic mcp support for openai router response api
sglang.author: key4ng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Implement basic mcp support for openai router response api. The current request flow is:
Client
  |
  |  POST /responses (contains MCP tool block)
  v
OpenAIRouter::route_responses
  |
  |-- check/transform request history
  |-- set store=false for upstream call
  |-- mcp_manager_from_req

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Merge MM embeddings by index instead of token IDs
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes a mismatch in merging multi-modal embeddings when the model itself generates embedding placeholder tokens such as <image>. Although this error mainly occurs in V1, it can possibly occur in V0 as well. This PR focuses on the V1 case.
For V0 users, you can work around this by setting top

vllm.title: [Bug]: Set LD_LIBRARY_PATH to include the 'standard' CUDA location
vllm.author: smarterclayton
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
NVIDIA changed the CUDA library install path in their base
images in 12.8, but some container providers automount drivers
in the old location. After discussion with NVIDIA future CUDA
images (13.0+) will revert to the old path. Until then, reduce
the friction for new vLLM users running on GK

vllm.title: [Core] GC Debug callback
vllm.author: Jialin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Introduce a GC callback for debug purpose which is gated by 2 newly added environment variables:

VLLM_GC_DEBUG: Whether to patch the callback
VLLM_GC_DEBUG_TOP_COLLECTED_OBJECTS: Set top-k collected objects to log

By default, the callback is detached, so it's an no-op to production.
Test P

vllm.title: [Bugfix][NIXL] Fix Async Scheduler timeout issue
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
To keep P kv blocks from being stranded in the case a request is aborted during decode, we have introduced a TTL/timeout #20139.
With async scheduling + high concurrency requests, this log line (and consequent logic) can be observed
